overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a fog-shrouded abandoned residential area. The character walks through desolate streets with abandoned vehicles, transitions to an interior courtyard via a cutscene, and examines a dilapidated apartment building while navigating narrow passages between structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned residential street with derelict vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the heavy fog toward a gated entrance, passing abandoned vehicles on either side

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking garage with visible pipes and industrial features
derelict white car parked on the street, partially obscured by fog
dark-colored abandoned vehicle visible through the fog on the right side
two-story brick building with boarded windows and weathered facade
large metal gate marking the entrance to the apartment complex ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a fog-shrouded abandoned street with extremely limited visibility. Derelict vehicles line the asphalt road as the character approaches a rusted metal gate leading to an apartment complex. The atmosphere is desolate and silent, with heavy fog diffusing the morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment complex inner courtyard with checkerboard tile flooring

events.description: screen fades to black and transitions to interior courtyard with checkerboard tile floor visible
on-screen text 'Woodside Apartment' appears identifying the building complex

agents.ego_description: walking across the tiled courtyard toward the apartment entrance gate after the scene transition

entered.detail: floor covered in distinctive black and white checkerboard patterned tiles
red vehicle parked against the left wall of the courtyard
wrought iron gate with archway marking the main entrance to the building
tall brick walls enclosing the courtyard on both sides

segments.scene_description: Following a fade-to-black transition, the scene shifts to a dimly lit interior courtyard with distinctive checkerboard tile flooring. The character walks toward a wrought iron entrance gate as on-screen text identifies the location as 'Woodside Apartment'. The space feels enclosed and oppressive compared to the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between tall apartment buildings with view of upper floors

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the upper floors and balconies of the apartment building

agents.ego_description: looking up at the apartment building balconies and windows while slowly moving through the narrow passage

entered.detail: tall multi-story apartment building with weathered concrete exterior and multiple balconies
rows of balconies with black metal railings extending up the building facade
external AC units mounted on the building walls between balconies
tall brick building forming the right wall of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a claustrophobic narrow passage between tall buildings, tilting the camera upward to examine the imposing apartment facade. Metal balconies and air conditioning units line the weathered concrete walls, while the heavy fog limits visibility above the third floor. The environment feels increasingly confined and threatening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a desolate, fog-shrouded street into the oppressive, confined depths of an apartment complex. It begins with the character navigating an asphalt road lined with derelict vehicles under a heavy, diffusing morning mist before approaching a rusted metal gate. As the scene shifts into a dimly lit interior courtyard, the open road gives way to an enclosed space featuring distinctive checkerboard tile flooring and a wrought iron entrance marked as Woodside Apartment. The camera then moves through a claustrophobic narrow passage between tall buildings, tilting upward to reveal weathered concrete walls adorned with metal balconies and air conditioning units. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly threatening as the heavy fog swallows the upper floors of the imposing facade, trapping the character within the narrow architectural corridor.
